sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8476" key="a)nergasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεργ-ασία</orth>,<gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n8476.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unemployment, idleness,</tr_> in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.67</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνεργίας.</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
